reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to authenticate and retrieve the GitHub username.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 and the application loaded successfully with the agent sidebar visible.
Step 2 - Found the "QA-20260423-041437-s4ai" agent in the sidebar with status "idle" and clicked on it.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "idle" on the agent detail page.
Step 4 - Typed and sent the message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." via the message input field.
Step 5 - An "Account Access Request" card appeared asking to allow access to GitHub. The GitHub account was already selected (checked). Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant the access.

Step 6a - After granting access, the agent showed an "API Request Review" card asking to allow the GitHub API call "GET /user" (Fetch GitHub authenticated user). Clicked "Allow" and selected "Allow Once" from the confirmation dialog.
Step 6b - Waited approximately 1 minute 41 seconds for the agent to complete processing.

Step 7 - Verified the agent returned a response containing the GitHub username "yiw190" with the exact text: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Status changed to "idle" indicating completion. Captured full-page screenshot documenting the result.
